rationale: Both notes indicate close methodological overlap: the citing paper’s core contribution is a Bayesian state-space/dynamic linear model with time-varying effects (Kalman + MCMC), and the cited paper is explicitly a hierarchical Bayesian dynamic linear model for evolving market-response parameters. That makes the cited work a plausible method/foundational source rather than an obvious incidental mention, so it merits second-stage relation judgment.
